ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., Caffe, ONNX, TensorRT) */,
  "devices" INTEGER /* Number of devices the model can run on */,
  "batch_size_gpu" INTEGER /* Batch size for GPU processing */,
  "batch_size_dla" INTEGER /* Batch size for DLA processing */,
  "ws_gpu" INTEGER /* Workspace size allocated for GPU in MB */,
  "ws_dla" INTEGER /* Workspace size allocated for DLA in MB */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input description */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model id */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the model's input format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input (e.g., float32, int32) */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the input tensor (e.g., [1, 224, 224, 3]) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the input is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output description */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model id */,
  "output_description" TEXT /* Description of the model's output format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the output (e.g., float32, int32) */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the output tensor (e.g., [1, 1000]) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the output is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model id */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the model or related resources */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., documentation, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the URL content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_urls_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model id */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding changes made in this version */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object or text field storing performance metrics (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, deploy) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., documentation, dataset) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
